scripts.build:hosting: npm run version:sync && npm run icons:generate && npm run test && npm run check:social && npm run build && npm run build:game && npm run build:table && npm run build:settlement && npm run build:session-startup && node scripts/prepare-hosting.js
scripts.build:test-version: BUILD_CHANNEL=dev node scripts/bump-version.js && BUILD_CHANNEL=dev npm run build:hosting
scripts.check:social: node --check docs/app.js && node --check docs/auth.js && node --check docs/firestore.js && node --check docs/local-hand-commit.js && node --check docs/session-startup.js && node --check docs/enrollment-roster.js && node --check docs/invite-code.js && node --check docs/game-functions.js && node --check docs/game-engine.js && node --check docs/bourre-rules.js && node --check docs/settlement-copy.js && node --check docs/house-rules.js && node --check docs/rules-content.js && node --check docs/rules-view.js && node --check docs/theme.js && node --check docs/feedback-prefs.js && node --check docs/version-update.js
scripts.build:functions: npm run build:game && node scripts/sync-functions-engine.mjs && npm install --prefix functions --omit=dev
scripts.preview:hosting: npm run build:hosting && npx serve dist -l 5000
scripts.deploy: node scripts/ensure-firebase-config.js && node scripts/check-deploy-version.mjs && npm run build:hosting && npm run build:functions && npx firebase deploy --only hosting,firestore:rules,functions --project national-bourre-league
scripts.deploy:patch: BUILD_CHANNEL=production node scripts/bump-version.js && BUILD_CHANNEL=production npm run deploy
scripts.deploy:hosting: node scripts/ensure-firebase-config.js && node scripts/check-deploy-version.mjs && npm run build:hosting && npx firebase deploy --only hosting --project national-bourre-league
scripts.deploy:hosting:patch: BUILD_CHANNEL=production node scripts/bump-version.js && BUILD_CHANNEL=production npm run deploy:hosting
scripts.deploy:functions: npm run build:functions && npx firebase deploy --only functions,firestore:rules
scripts.test:game: tsx --test src/game/handState.test.ts src/game/deal.test.ts src/game/draw.test.ts src/game/legal.test.ts src/game/playContext.test.ts src/game/trick.test.ts src/game/play.test.ts src/game/bots.test.ts src/game/enrollment.test.ts src/game/fullHand.test.ts src/game/playerMatrix.test.ts src/game/playerOrder.test.ts src/game/decision.test.ts
scripts.test:table: tsx --test src/table/logic.test.ts src/table/localAction.test.ts src/table/handUi.test.ts src/table/settlementCopy.test.ts src/table/trickTiming.test.ts src/table/trickPresentationMachine.test.ts src/table/trickPlayFly.test.ts src/table/handPresentationMachine.test.ts src/table/heroHandDisplay.test.ts src/table/trumpHolderPresentation.test.ts src/table/tableMicrointeractions.test.ts src/table/stageFit.test.ts src/table/layout/mobileSeatMap.test.ts src/table/feedback/feedback.test.ts src/table/yourTurnAttention.test.ts src/table/seatMetadata.test.ts src/components/cardGesture.test.ts src/components/handLayout.test.ts src/table/animations/flip.test.ts
scripts.test:session: tsx --test src/session/logic.test.ts src/session/dealer.test.ts src/session/liveHand.test.ts src/session/handLifecycle.test.ts src/session/presetNames.test.ts src/session/tableStartup.test.ts src/session/tableHandChoice.test.ts
scripts.test:rules: node --test scripts/bourre-rules.test.mjs scripts/risk-stakes.test.mjs scripts/room-ante-state.test.mjs scripts/remove-session-player.test.mjs scripts/invite-code.test.mjs scripts/firestore-settlement-rules.test.mjs scripts/local-hand-commit.test.mjs
scripts.test:functions: npm run build:game && node scripts/sync-functions-engine.mjs && npm ci --prefix functions --omit=dev && npm test --prefix functions
scripts.test: npm run test:game && npm run test:table && npm run test:session && npm run test:rules && npm run test:version && npm run test:functions
scripts.test:release: npm run test:qa && npm run build:functions && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:qa: npm run test && npm run check:social && npm run build:game && npm run build:table && npm run build:settlement && npm run build:session-startup
